concept: PR Executive turned Blood Sorcerer Regent
biography: Mad Men era PR executive from 1960s New York. Discovered the Ball of Truth marble artifact, became obsessed with the occult, caught Tremere attention. Embraced early 1960s. Spent decades in New York building Tremere reputation and mastering blood magic. Sent to Phoenix 1 year ago to rebuild clan standing after failed coup. Maintains strong mentor relationship with sire. Upper management type who understands modern business and ancient blood sorcery equally well.
equipment: Ball of Truth (marble artifact), modern business attire, ritual implements, encrypted communication devices

backgroundDetails.Resources: Wealthy from both mortal investments and Tremere support
backgroundDetails.Status: Regent of Phoenix Chantry, rebuilding reputation
backgroundDetails.Contacts: Business connections in Phoenix, NYC underworld, Camarilla informants
backgroundDetails.Mentor: His sire, powerful NYC elder with whom he maintains strong relationship

merits_flaws.name: Natural Leader
merits_flaws.description: Exceptional at inspiring and commanding others

merits_flaws.name: Sphere Natural (Blood)
merits_flaws.description: Master of Path of Blood magic

merits_flaws.name: Clan Enmity (Giovanni)
merits_flaws.description: Active rivalry with Giovanni over occult influence

status.notes: END-GAME NPC. Smooth politician with 60+ years experience. Rebuilding Tremere reputation in Phoenix after coup. Can't run for Prince due to clan hatred. Using Prince's death as opportunity to build relationships. Possesses Ball of Truth artifact. Fully adapted to modern nights.

artifacts.name: Ball of Truth
artifacts.description: Polished marble that detects lies from those with lower Mental attributes. Emits metallic ringing sound. Usable once per 24 hours. Created by NYC magician in early 1960s. Whitmore plays with it as affectation when bored.
